sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67391" key="mhli/s3" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μηλίς</orth> (C), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">yellow pigment</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58d</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Μηλιάς, Μήλιος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
